ideation: This animation sequence simulates the surprise and impact of an explosion.  The arms start in a relaxed position, then rapidly move outward and upward, mimicking the outward force of a blast. Finally, they return to a more relaxed state, suggesting the aftermath of the explosion. The sequence uses both arms in a mirrored fashion to give a sense of the blast's all-encompassing nature.  I will use slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions to create a sense of dynamic movement and avoid rigidity.

frames.beat: arms explode outwards and upwards with force
arms reach their peak, a sudden burst
arms recoil and settle after the impact
